label: Twitch — Live Streaming Platform
description: Twitch — live streaming platform. Video player with chat sidebar. React-based. Following directory, channel pages, chat. Login via email/phone + password + 2FA common.
source_patterns: Browse directory: grid of live channels, card previews, scroll through categories
Channel page: video player (top/left) + chat sidebar (bottom/right). React SPA transitions 1-2s
Chat interaction: view scrolling messages, click input → 500-800ms think → type message → Enter to send
Follow/unfollow: click follow button, brief animation, no page reload
Clip creation: click clip button → 1-2s modal → trim → publish
Subscription flow: click subscribe → modal → select tier → payment confirm → 2FA if enabled
Login: email/phone → 1-3s → password → 2FA (TOTP/SMS, common for streamers)

active_hours.description: Gaming/streaming hours — peaks afternoon, evening, late night

scroll.description: Directory browse — grid grid-style scroll, fast passes through category rows. Chat auto-scroll — no manual scroll needed

mouse.description: Moderate-fast — gaming audience accustomed to quick cursor movements

platform_specific.sequence_hint: navigate directory → browse categories (3-4 passes) → click channel → wait player+chat → read chat → click input → type message → send | click follow | click clip → trim → publish
